summary: M3-TASK-GRAPH-001 is closed after PR #53 entered main at e1b323a698c267ba3cf016aee22e67d37822ff2a. The M3 task graph is integrated, downstream M3 tasks remain DRAFT, and the next dependency-ready candidates are M3-HISTORICAL-CLAIM-PIPELINE-001 and M3-POLITY-VASSALAGE-001.

PR #53 merged and local main fast-forwarded to e1b323a698c267ba3cf016aee22e67d37822ff2a.

decisions: M3-TASK-GRAPH-001 is CLOSED because its accepted task graph commit is integrated into main.
Do not start downstream M3 implementation in the closure branch.
risks: The next M3 tasks are ready candidates only; each still requires normal lead-owned routing, writer handoff, reviewer handoff, and integration.
requested_action: Open and merge the closure PR, then continue with the dependency-ready M3 task graph under autonomous goal-mode gates.
